做多: 突破唐奇安通道上軌 + 價格在 EMA 上方（趨勢濾網） + 成交量突增 | 做空: 跌破唐奇安通道下軌 + 成交量突增 | 出場: OBV 背離出場 | 止損:4.0% 止盈:8.0%
做多: EMA 快線上穿慢線 + 價格在 EMA 上方（趨勢濾網） + 成交量突增 | 做空: 跌破唐奇安通道下軌 + 成交量突增 | 出場: MACD 反向交叉出場 | 止損:4.0% 止盈:8.0%
code:
def strategy(candles, i, indicators, open_trades):
    closes = [c.close for c in candles[:i+1]]
    if len(closes) < 60:
        return []
    actions = []
    ema_u_f = ema(closes, 5)
    ema_u_s = ema(closes, 26)
    ema_trend = ema(closes, 50)
    _vols = [c.volume for c in candles[:i+1]]; _vs = sma(_vols, 10); vol_sma_val = _vs[-1] if _vs else None
    dc_upper, dc_lower = donchian(candles[:i+1], 30)
    if not open_trades:
        if not (ema_u_f[i] is None or ema_u_s[i] is None or ema_u_f[i-1] is None or ema_u_s[i-1] is None or ema_trend[i] is None or vol_sma_val is None) and ema_u_f[i-1] <= ema_u_s[i-1] and ema_u_f[i] > ema_u_s[i] and closes[i] > ema_trend[i] and vol_sma_val is not None and candles[i].volume > vol_sma_val * 2.0:
            actions.append({"action": "buy"})
        elif not (dc_lower[i] is None or dc_lower[i-1] is None or vol_sma_val is None) and dc_lower[i] is not None and closes[i] < dc_lower[i-1] and vol_sma_val is not None and candles[i].volume > vol_sma_val * 2.0:
            actions.append({"action": "sell"})
    if open_trades:
        macd_ex_l, macd_ex_s, _ = macd(closes, 12, 26, 9)
        if macd_ex_l[i] is not None and macd_ex_s[i] is not None and macd_ex_l[i-1] is not None and macd_ex_s[i-1] is not None and ((open_trades[0].side == 'long' and macd_ex_l[i-1] >= macd_ex_s[i-1] and macd_ex_l[i] < macd_ex_s[i]) or (open_trades[0].side == 'short' and macd_ex_l[i-1] <= macd_ex_s[i-1] and macd_ex_l[i] > macd_ex_s[i])):
            actions.append({"action": "close"})
    return actions
